title: Dichrotrichum ternateum
taxonomy: Dichrotrichum ternateum belongs to the class Bryopsida, a group of mosses. It is further classified into the family Polytrichaceae, commonly known as the hair cap moss family. Within the family, Dichrotrichum ternateum is classified into the genus Dichrotrichum. The genus Dichrotrichum is a part of the order Polytrichales, which includes other mosses with similar characteristics. Overall, Dichrotrichum ternateum's classification reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the world of mosses.
